title: Meta-analyses of the determinants and outcomes of belief in climate change
authors: Matthew J. Hornsey, Emily A. Harris, Paul G. Bain, Kelly S. Fielding

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: support for carbon tax/cap and trade
tax_mentions.context: Outcome variable synthesized across 31 studies on climate-change belief and policy support.
tax_mentions.notes: Combined with cap-and-trade; not tax-only estimate.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Non-tax ETS component pooled with carbon tax; not separately estimated.

inclusion_reason: Contains a direct synthesized outcome on support for carbon tax/cap and trade, which is relevant to carbon-tax acceptability despite pooling with ETS.
